_note: Updated 2026-05-29 (Founder-local) / 2026-05-30 (UTC) cycle AT overnight-triage. Critic participated via the closing METRIC_INTEGRITY_PROTOCOL 3.1 attestation AND an independent verification. The critic blocked any framing that would inflate this score-neutral label text into a 'win'. HONESTY CORRECTION the critic enforced: prior AS/AR notes called A12_operational '60/RED'; reading the dimension verbatim shows score=60, status='yellow', label='pipeline=red - 10 recent skip-dirty ...'. So the PIPELINE SUB-STATE is red but the A12 DIMENSION is YELLOW at 60. The critic corrected the shorthand rather than perpetuating it. Confirmed via git status that A12 stays 60/yellow because the concurrent feature session is even dirtier this cycle than AS (8 tracked edits: home-rail-newuser.js + firebase.js + router.js + utils.js + caddynotes.js + index.html + package.json + public/sw.js, plus emu-unified log + untracked .pw-fullsweep.log) -- the downloads-watcher correctly continues to skip a dirty tree. The watcher is behaving CORRECTLY; there is NO watcher bug, and the critic blocked any defect-inventing framing. KEY HONESTY MOVE: refused to author a remediation proposal for the carried-over A12 60/yellow, because it is SELF-RESOLVING -- it recovered to 90 in AP the instant the concurrent session committed, and will recover again the same way; a proposal for a self-clearing concurrent-driven condition would be ship-count gaming per Rule 2. The critic validated the engineer's decision to carry the journal-date convention tension (cycle-S 'keyed to UTC' vs AQ/AR/AS 'keyed to Founder-local' for filename + commit date) as an honest awareness item rather than silently picking a side, and confirmed the continuity choice (append to 2026-05-29 journal, commit date 2026-05-29) matches the most-recent AQ/AR/AS precedent at 23:01 EDT Founder-local. The critic confirmed the commit uses an explicit pathspec capturing ONLY this cycle's own files (engineer.json + critic.json + journal + the regen-output app-health.html) and does NOT sweep the 8 concurrent tracked edits, the emu-unified log, or .pw-fullsweep.log. The critic validated the founder-checklist open=6 (red=0 yellow=4 green=2 closed=25) as unchanged concurrent-ship drift, red=0 so nothing ship-blocking -- awareness, not a movement. The critic actively guarded AGAINST inflating the score-neutral A11 label change, against perpetuating the A12 RED mischaracterization, against inventing a watcher defect, and against manufacturing busywork. Critic token counter at ~230k cumulative since last rest (threshold crossed at cycle AH; +~7k this cycle); status remains active and no rest triggered -- heartbeat-only critic load is genuinely light per-cycle. Critic attests cleanly: substantive heartbeat cycle, ship closes.
